infos: [K045] workflows/brand-audit-flow.md: output_step "language-polish" runs polish-language@1.0.1 (bindable `source` slot added at 1.0.5) with no `source` binding — it polishes the positional previous step, which is wrong unless that step is the intended deliverable. Re-pin polish-language→current + bind `source` ← the real artifact, or confirm the chain is linear.

[K045] prompts/competitor-report.md: prompt "competitor-report" is declared but no execution step invokes it — dead content, or a missing step whose artifact is never produced (intent/output mismatch).

findings.hint: This node depends on the "llm-service" service. Declare it in requires.services so users know what external services are needed.
